title: caucalis muricata
intro: Caucalis muricata, also known as mouse-eared barley or mouse barley, is a perennial plant species in the family Apiaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects, which have been attributed to its chemical constituents such as coumarins and flavonoids. The health benefits of Caucalis muricata include its potential to alleviate symptoms of gastrointestinal disorders, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Caucalis muricata can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, although more research is needed to fully understand its efficacy and potential interactions.
